creator: maniactraq@gmail.com
text:
Server has been crashing every 2 or 3 days since upgrading to 11.1-RELEASE-p9. Downgraded to 11.1-RELEASE-p8 and all was well, went back to -p9 and it started crashing again.

I posted on the forums and was asked to post a bug report. https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/server-crashes-periodically-after-upgrading-to-11-1-release-p9.65638/

Here's some info, please let me know if anything else is needed:

# uname -a
FreeBSD 6.example.net 11.1-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p9 #11: Tue Apr 24 19:55:09 UTC 2018     test@6.example.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/6  amd64
